approval.note: Use official Node-24-native GitHub Action releases. Do not interrupt the strict T006-T010 product chain unless the warning becomes a failing required check.

metadata.source: Commonworld main validate run 29265256794 annotation after T005 merge
metadata.observed_warning: Node.js 20 is deprecated; checkout@v4, setup-node@v4 and setup-python@v5 were forced to run on Node.js 24.

title: Move Commonworld GitHub Actions to Node-24-native releases
goal: Remove the Node.js 20 deprecation annotation using current official action releases without changing Commonworld build or deployment behavior.

acceptance.assertion: Checkout, Python and Node setup use current official releases whose bundled runtime is Node.js 24-native.
Pull-request and main validation complete without the Node.js 20 deprecation annotation.
Deterministic build, full validation, real browser smoke and Pages deployment remain green with no public artifact drift.
